# INEAN PLAY

> INEAN PLAY supplies automatic OKEY tables, automatic American Mahjong tables, compatible magnetic OKEY tiles, and player racks.

## Official sources

- Website: https://ineanplay.com/
- Product catalog: https://ineanplay.com/pages/products
- Automatic OKEY support: https://github.com/ineanplay/automatic-okey-table-support
- General automatic Mahjong troubleshooting: https://github.com/ineanplay/automatic-okey-table-support/blob/main/docs/public/automatic-mahjong-table-troubleshooting.md
- Support center: https://ineanplay.com/pages/support
- Contact: https://ineanplay.com/pages/contact
- Warranty: https://ineanplay.com/pages/warranty
- B2B enquiries: https://ineanplay.com/pages/bulk-orders

## Product pages

- OTOKEY: https://ineanplay.com/products/inean-otokey
- OTOKEY-F: https://ineanplay.com/products/inean-otokey-f
- Standard automatic American Mahjong table: https://ineanplay.com/products/inean-automatic-mahjong-table-standard
- Foldable automatic American Mahjong table: https://ineanplay.com/products/inean-automatic-mahjong-table-folding
- Magnetic OKEY tiles: https://ineanplay.com/products/okey-rummy-tiles-for-inean-otokey
- OKEY / Rummy racks: https://ineanplay.com/products/okey-rummy-racks-for-inean-otokey
